overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a Space Marine battling Tyranid aliens in a gothic industrial cathedral interior with green energy beams and candle-lit shrines. The player engages in melee combat alongside allied NPCs, transitions through a server corridor, and collects items from a shrine before returning to combat.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular combat arena with green energy beams

events.description: player character engages Tyranid aliens in melee combat with chainsword
allied Space Marines join the fight against the Tyranid swarm

agents.ego_description: player-controlled Space Marine fighting Tyranid creatures with melee attacks alongside squad members

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior lunging with scythe-like claws
Allied Space Marine firing bolter at enemies

entered.detail: Large circular metal grate platform with intricate geometric patterns
Vertical green energy beams rising from the center of the chamber
Tall gothic stone archways with industrial metal detailing

segments.scene_description: The player character, a Space Marine, fights Tyranid aliens in a circular industrial chamber dominated by green energy beams. Allied Space Marines provide support fire from the left while the player engages in melee combat at the center of the metal platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic industrial hall with scattered debris

events.description: large Tyranid warrior with glowing red carapace engages in close combat
winged Tyranid creature descends into the chamber to attack

agents.ego_description: fighting larger Tyranid variants including a winged Hive Tyrant with heavy melee attacks

notable_agents.action: Large Tyranid warrior with red glowing carapace attacking with scythe claws
Winged Tyranid creature landing amidst the combat

entered.detail: Broken metal pieces and organic matter covering the floor
Ornate stone pillars supporting the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: Combat intensifies against larger Tyranid variants in the gothic industrial hall. The player battles a large warrior with glowing red carapace and a winged creature while navigating around scattered debris and stone pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: server room corridor with green indicator lights

events.description: exits main combat chamber into narrow corridor lined with server racks

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow corridor lined with server racks, leaving the combat area behind

entered.detail: Tall server racks with glowing green indicator lights
Narrow passage with gothic arches and industrial cabling

segments.scene_description: The player exits the combat arena into a narrow corridor lined with server racks emitting green lights. The space is tight and enclosed, providing a brief respite from the combat.

scene_state.functional_zone: small shrine alcove with candles and mechanical artifacts

events.description: collects Medicae Stimms medical supplies from the shrine
acquires Auto Bolt Rifle from weapon rack

agents.ego_description: approaching a candle-lit shrine to collect medical supplies and ammunition

entered.detail: Altar with numerous lit candles and mechanical components
Large mechanical structure with gears behind the shrine
Rack holding bolter weapons and ammunition

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small shrine alcove illuminated by candlelight and featuring a large mechanical statue. They interact with the environment to collect medical supplies and a new weapon from racks near the altar.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to main combat chamber with green energy beams

events.description: aims down sights at distant targets near the green beams
resumes combat stance in main chamber

agents.ego_description: returning to the main chamber and aiming the bolter rifle at the green energy structure

notable_agents.action: Allied Space Marine engaging enemies near the green beams

entered.detail: Vertical green energy beams in the center of the chamber
Broken wooden planks and debris on the floor

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the main combat chamber, passing broken wooden barricades. They aim down sights at the green energy beams in the distance where an allied Space Marine continues fighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a chaotic industrial battleground through a quiet sanctuary and back into the fray. It begins in a circular chamber dominated by green energy beams, where a Space Marine engages in melee combat with Tyranid aliens while allies provide supporting fire. As the fight intensifies, the camera tracks the player through a gothic hall filled with stone pillars and debris, battling larger winged creatures and red-carapaced warriors. The scene then shifts away from the violence into a narrow, enclosed corridor lined with glowing green server racks before opening into a candle-lit shrine alcove featuring a large mechanical statue and equipment racks. Finally, the camera follows the player back through broken wooden barricades and into the main chamber, aiming toward the distant green beams where the battle continues.
